raw_response_text:
<features>
- Large, flat petals with a central cluster of stamens/pistils.
- Petal color is deep purple/burgundy.
- Petal shape is elongated and somewhat pointed.
- The structure resembles the clematis flowers in the examples.
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has large, flat, spreading petals with a prominent central cluster of stamens] THEN [81]
- IF [flower has large, drooping, yellow petals with distinct markings] THEN [14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image features large, flat, spreading petals with a prominent central cluster of stamens, which matches the visual pattern of class 81. It does not match the yellow, drooping structure of class 14.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- Yellow petals
- Large, broad petals with some dark veining/markings in the center
- Long, green stem and leaves
</features>
<kb>
- IF petals are pink/purple with white edges and a central dark core THEN class is 81
- IF petals are yellow and broad with dark markings in the center THEN class is 14
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image features large yellow petals with dark markings in the center, which matches the pattern for class 14.
</rule_check>

<response>14</response>
